description: Vendor-neutral spreadsheet and tabular workflows spanning sheets, workbooks, and structured tables.
design_rules: Tasks must stay vendor-neutral within the category.
Tasks should be short enough for high sample count and repeated simulation.
Fake tools should preserve differentiated product logic, not just naming differences.

core_tasks.title: Read a rectangular range
core_tasks.goal: Read values from a specified range in structured form.

core_tasks.title: Write a new table
core_tasks.goal: Create or write a new table/sheet region.

core_tasks.title: Append rows
core_tasks.goal: Append rows safely without corrupting data.

core_tasks.title: Find and update by key
core_tasks.goal: Locate a record by key and update a target field.

core_tasks.title: Filter and summarize
core_tasks.goal: Filter rows by condition and summarize the result.

core_tasks.title: Compare ranges or sheets
core_tasks.goal: Find and summarize differences between two ranges/sheets.

explicit_exclusions: Chart generation as a hard requirement
